title: Official Legacy Crafting Dead
description: The Crafting Dead is a popular Minecraft mod
body:
The Crafting Dead Mod
The Crafting Dead is a popular Minecraft mod that transforms the game into a post-apocalyptic survival experience, inspired by zombie survival games and media. This mod introduces new mechanics, weapons, structures, and an immersive world where players must scavenge, craft, and fight to survive against hordes of zombies and other players.

Features
Zombie Apocalypse Survival: Face off against hordes of the undead in a decaying world.
Guns & Weapons: Equip yourself with a variety of firearms, melee weapons, and explosives.
Looting & Scavenging: Explore abandoned structures, cities, and military bases for survival gear.
PvP & Multiplayer: Engage in combat with other players in both single-player and multiplayer modes.
Medical System: Use bandages, painkillers, and other medical supplies to stay alive.
Custom Crafting & Building: Create bases, barricades, and fortifications to protect yourself.
Versions
This page refers to the legacy 1.6.4 version of The Crafting Dead. For the latest version with modern features and updates, visit:
CurseForge - Crafting Dead Official

Useful Links
Official Website: https://craftingdead.com
Twitter: https://twitter.com/craftingdead
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UChVv4y3VK5NS3SrGdElL22Q
Source Code (GitHub): https://github.com/nexusnode/crafting-dead
